title: Apparitions In The Dark
description: Combat, Horror, AND EXPLORATION?! Yes it exists and Apparitions In The Dark has it all! FIXED11!!!!!!!!!!!!!1!!!1!!11

_**![banner split into 3 sections divided by diagonal lines. the 1st section is a horror section with freddy fazbear and herobrine, the 2nd section is the exploration section with a giant adventure map background  with a giant spyglass and big compass, and the 3rd section is the combat section with a big shield with a sword design mosaic behind it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e84e3a6e486ee634e28fc30ef6f20c187f1b8542_0.webp)



A Modpack with **_Adventure, horror and combat elements too??!!_**
**It exists and it's called Apparitions In The Dark**
Apparitions in the dark (or aitd) adds 
- A skill tree
- FNAF Management Wanted and, From The Fog
- Better Combat, Par-Cool, and Combat Roll
- Biomes of  Plenty, Choice Theorems Villages, Moogs Structures
  And WAY WAY More!

Banner by: KSStudios
